Comprehensive coverage of all technical aspects with minimal syntax issues.

Overall correctness is very high with both sessions providing accurate technical information. Session 2 carries higher weight due to comprehensive analysis depth. Combined average reflects strong technical accuracy across both environmental context and detailed analysis components.
